title: Break Tactics
summary: Emergency dispersal maneuvers to avoid concentrated enemy fire.
details: Break command orders immediate dispersal. Each ship breaks in pre-assigned direction - typically odd ships break port, even ships break starboard. Break hard with maximum thrust. Purpose: make targeting impossible, avoid area weapons, create confusion. After break, reform on leader's call. Break is defensive - use when formation would take unacceptable casualties.
annotations: Practice break drills to prevent collisions.
Break should be instinctive when called.
